message:
feat(ui): improve basket empty state with engaging design

- Add visual polish with larger icon in styled container
- Add decorative sparkle accent for personality
- Clear value proposition: "download or install them all at once"
- Add "Browse prompts" CTA button that closes sidebar
- Add mobile-only swipe hint tip
- Use neutral color palette for consistency

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-maui

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ import { Copy, Check, ShoppingBasket, + Sparkles, + Search, } from "lucide-react"; import { useBasket } from "@/hooks/use-basket"; import { Button } from "./ui/button"; @@ -198,11 +200,37 @@ export function BasketSidebar({ isOpen, onClose }: BasketSidebarProps) { {/* Items list */}
{basketPrompts.length === 0 ? ( -
- -

Your basket is empty

-

- Add prompts to export them together +

+ {/* Illustrated empty state with decorative sparkle */} +
+
+ +
+ +
+ +

+ Your basket is empty +

+ +

+ Save prompts here to download or install them all at once. +

+ + {/* CTA to close sidebar and browse */} + + + {/* Hint for mobile users */} +

+ Tip: Swipe right on any prompt card to add it

) : (
